args: cd '${workspaceFolder}/vhs'; if (Test-Path '.venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1') { & '.venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1' } else { Write-Warning 'vhs/.venv not found — run: python setup.py' }

cd '${workspaceFolder}/photoalbums'; if (Test-Path '.venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1') { & '.venv/Scripts/Activate.ps1' } else { Write-Warning 'photoalbums/.venv not found — create it with: python -m venv .venv && .venv/Scripts/pip install -r requirements.txt' }
